docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASTINGS, EDWIN B.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION TO TRANSFER CASE TO SMALL CLAIMS; DECLARATION AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASTINGS, EDWIN B.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EDWIN HASTINGS' MOTION TO TRANSFER CASE TO SMALL CLAIMS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ONCE THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO SMALL CLAIMS, PLAINTIFF WILL NOT BE PERMITTED TO SEEK ANY AMOUNT ABOVE THE SMALL CLAIMS JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Off Calendar May-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lulu Weng, Esq., from Allied Insurance, 510-232-9300
Samuel Semerjian, defendant in Pro Per, no card
There was no appearance by plaintiff when the matter was called the first time.

The defendant and the insurance did not opposed the tentative ruling. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF EDWIN HASTINGS' Notice Of Motion To Transfer Case To Small Claims is Granted. No opposition filed. Once the case is transferred to small claims, Plaintiff will not be permitted to seek any amount above the small claims jurisdictional limit. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
Edwin Hastings, plaintiff in Pro Per, 415-756-8359, plaintiff came late and presented a proposed order to the court. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; not reported.
